[e][h]Brawl Stars Championship 2026: Brawl Cup
League Information
Series:
Brawl Stars Championship 2026
Organizers:
Supercell
BLAST
Game:
Brawl Stars
Type:
Offline
Location:
 Berlin
Venue:
Uber Eats Music Hall
Prize Pool:
$100,000 USD
Start Date:
2026-05-15
End Date:
2026-05-17
Teams:
12
Liquipedia Tier:
S-Tier 
Links
Chronology
BC 2025

About

[edit]

Broadcast Talent

[edit]

On-Stage Cast

[edit]
  • Hosts:
    •  Banks (Barney Banks)
    •  Sunny (Dilana)
  • English Commentators:
    •  Ark
    •  Kenny (Kenny Barlow)
    •  ReddySet (Edward Chamblee)
    •  TravTalks (Declan Traviss)
    •  Uber (Mitch Leslie)

Co-Cast

[edit]
  • Spanish Commentators:
    •  NeaRz (Luis Guevara)
    •  Spiuk (Manuel Fernández Asua)
  • Portuguese Commentators:
    •  BrunoClash (Bruno Veiga Lopes)
    •  King Joe
  • German Commentators:
    •  Bytzep (Laurence)
    •  Ich
    •  Tadomari (Lukas Phillipps)
  • Japanese Commentators:
    •  Melty
    •  Wahochi
    •  Yuki
  • Italian Commentators:
    •  Ferre (Luca Ferrero)
    •  PlayerD
  • French Commentators:
    •  Kuzan
    •  PiouPiouLover (Enzo)
  • Polish Commentators:
    •  Torii
    •  Veni
  • Turkish Commentators:
    •  Oyunlarin Ustasi (Fuat Gıder)
    •  Slorien (Yunus Altunsoy)
  • Russian Commentators:
    •  El Nino TV
    •  Skiller (Denis)
  • Chinese Commentator:
    •  Chun (Jian Sheng)

Format

[edit]
  • Participants
    • 8 Main Regions teams and 2 Chinese Mainland teams qualify directly by BSC points
    • 1 SESA team qualifies from RTBC SESA Decider Playoffs
    • 1 SA West team qualifies from RTBC SA West
    • Slots are allocated as follows:
      • 2 for North America, EMEA, South America, East Asia, and Chinese Mainland
      • 1 for Southeast / South Asia and South America West

  • Group Stage
    • 4 groups of 3 teams
    • Single round-robin
    • All matches are Bo5xBo3
    • Top 2 teams from each group advance to Playoffs

  • Playoffs
    • Single-elimination Bracket
    • All matches are Bo5xBo3

Prize Pool

[edit]
$100,000 USD are spread among the participants as seen below:

Note: Teams from Road to Brawl Cup competitions are ineligible to earn circuit points as their path to the post-season is through Third Party events.

References

[edit]
  1. ↑ Only Realm (2026-05-14). "Final day until brawl cup starts, good vibes and scrims.".
  2. ↑ Bounty Hunters (2026-05-11). "O novo caçador já está com o time em Berlin, focado 100% na preparação para o torneio.".
  3. ↑ FUT Esports (2026-05-12). "Official Statement regarding Brawl Cup.".
  4. ↑ BC* Gaming (2026-04-20). "We are happy to welcome our new team from South America to the BC* Family".
